name: partner-grid
title: Fuse PartnerGrid
description: Fuse-canon partner data grid wrapping DiceUI's Data Grid with the streaming-cell state machine + IPP score column + 3 modes (Discover results / list-detail browse-edit / streaming enrichment). Cell render-branch order load-bearing: empty/pending/processing → error → inconclusive → confirmed_null → confirmed_value per fuse-web CLAUDE.md "Streaming cells" invariant. Trailing state satisfies "confirmed_value" is the exhaustiveness guard. Memo wall: per-row streaming snapshot on row.original[STREAMING_KEY] so React.memo'd row invalidates on each SSE tick — refs + out-of-band state do not cut it. HR 12 modal=false preserved on Radix DropdownMenu (column header sort/pin/hide + row action menu). HR 19 source attribution per cell: confirmed-value cells display value only — no inline confidence %, no src-dot. Evidence lives in panel Evidence tab. Cell humanizers (partner-type / size / segment / region / industry enums → sentence-case display labels). Source: fuse-web components/grid/partner-grid.tsx + 2026-04-20 data-grid architecture decision lock.
